evidence: "It's watchable but sappy.......something to look at when you need a fairy tale like fix."
"Hail Britannia.....an entertaining (and somewhat fanciful) tale that involves the AUTHOR of Sherlock Holmes, Arthur Conan Doyle and his 'Watson' George"
"the plot follows a realistic path as Mr Selfridge and all the other cast bump and bungle heart warmingly,sometimes tragically, thru life."
"the initial review was the reason I tried it and I didn't expect too much."
"Four stars plus....all episodes, AFTER the first one, were really great getting better as the story progressed."
"Really liked the series....most disappointed that there appears to be only one season available!"
"Cinematography is excellent and definitely supports the moods intended."
"Character portrayals were spot on and the Hitchcockian introductions to each episode were wonderful!"
"Hard to beat anything with the '24' association.....had already seen it; just loved it again is all."
"the acting is remarkable and the plot follows a realistic path as Mr Selfridge and all the other cast bump and bungle heart warmingly,sometimes tragically, thru life."
"Cinematography is excellent and definitely supports the moods intended."
"AN AMAZING SERIES WITH A TOTALLY UNEXPECTED ENDING."

summary: The user enjoys drama and fantasy genres, with a preference for slower-paced narratives that focus on character development and emotional depth. They value high production quality and are sensitive to the emotional impact of the stories they watch.
